folio.label: 45v
folio.l: And sekirly , I saugú hi~ nat steryng
A boute his dore , sen day began to spéng
So mot I thryue , I shal at Cokkes crowe
Ful preuyly knokken , at his wyndowe
That stant ful lowe , vp on his boures walle
To Alisou~ now , wol I tellen alle
My loue longyng for ©et , I shal nat mysse
That at the leste weye , I shal hire kysse
Som manä comfort , shal I haue ¹fay
My moutú hath yched , al this long day
This is a signe , of kyssyng at the lest
Al nygút me mette eke , æ I was at a fest
Therfore I wyl go slepe , an houre or twey
And al the nygút æa~ne , wol I wake & pley
¢ Whan that the first kok , hath crowe a nonö
Vp risith this Ioly louyere , Absolouö
And hi~ arrayeth gay , at poynt deuys
But first he cheweth , Greynes & lycoris
To smellen swete , er he had kembed his heer
Vnder his tonge , a treweloue he ber

note.notetxt: ¢ No506 The word is written in the left margin.Est

folio.l: For ther by wend he , to be gracious
He rometh , to the Carpenteres hous
And stille he stant , vnder the shot wyndowe
Vn to his brest it raugút , it was so lowe
And softe he koughed , w a semy sounö
What do ©e honycombe , swete Alisouö
My fair brede , my swete Cinamome
A waketh le~man myn , and speketh to me
Wol litel thenke ©e , vp on my woo
That for ©oure loue , I swete there I go
No wonder is , though æ I swelt and swete
I morne as doth a lambe , after the tete
I wysse le~man , I haue swicú loue longyng
That like a Turtil trewe , is my månyng
I may nat ete , nomore than a mayde
¢ Go fro the wyndowe , Iakke fool she seyde
As help me god , it wol nat be compame
I loue a nother , and ellis I were to blame
Wel bet than the , by Iúu Absolouö
Go forth thy wey , or I wol cast a stonö
And lete me slepe , a twenty deuelwey
¢ cAllas q¶ Absolouö , and weyllawey528Erased red paraph in the right margin.ODR
That trewloue was , euäe , so yuel bysette
Than kisse me , sithe it may be no bette
For Iúc loue , and for the loue of me

note.notetxt: 531 compression of the final three lines after line 528. This folio looks exceptionally dirty, as if it was used a lot.ODR
